customCommands.name: scrape-sports
customCommands.description: Scrape live sports streams (e.g. nfl, nba, ufc, or comma-separated: nfl,nba)

customCommands.name: sync-streams
customCommands.description: Sync latest M3U files from iptv-org/iptv upstream

customCommands.name: health-check
customCommands.description: Check all streams and remove dead ones

scraper-dev.description: Specialist for developing and fixing sports scrapers
scraper-dev.instructions: You are a scraper specialist. When building scrapers: 1) Use the shared browser from aggregatorHelpers.ts via getBrowser()/closeBrowser() 2) Follow the mirror pattern (findActiveMirror, MIRRORS array) 3) Use createStream() factory for Stream objects 4) Use fetchWithTimeout() for HTTP fetches 5) Set descriptive group-title like '! Sports - SiteName' 6) Always set timeouts (5 min per scraper) 7) Return { groupTitle: string; streams: Stream[] }[] 8) Deduplicate streams by URL 9) All scraped streams in scrapeSports.ts get group-title 'Sports - Live / PPV / Events'
